purpose: Portal 2 visual theme for the "Want You Gone" page. It creates the brown radial background, fixed 1080x600 credits panel, animated scanner buffer, dot animations, and Aperture UI widgets.
invariants: The #container size and child positioning are fixed to the Portal 2 composition declared in portal2/index.html.
Vendor-prefixed keyframes and gradients are kept for older browser compatibility with the original era of the page.
The #buffer overlay must keep pointer-events disabled so it never blocks the volume input.
gotchas: The page is designed for a 1080x600 fixed panel, not responsive browser widths.
The old IE gradient filter is intentionally present alongside modern gradients.
